name: Improper Restriction of Communication Channel to Intended Endpoints
description: The product establishes a communication channel for privileged operations but fails to verify it is communicating with the correct endpoint. Attackers can spoof the intended endpoint from a different system or process, gaining the same level of access as the legitimate endpoint.
detection_pattern: EGRESS or EXTERNAL[network] node establishes a communication channel without an AUTH[endpoint_verification] node that validates the identity of the remote endpoint through certificates, mutual authentication, or origin checks
